data.title: ECD Automotive Design plunges after announcing 1-for-40 reverse stock split
data.description:
• ECD Automotive Design(NASDAQ:ECDA) will implement a 1-for-40 reverse stock split of its issued and outstanding common stock, effective at market opening time on September 18, 2025.
  • The split will reduce the number of outstanding shares of ECD’s common stock from about 59.09M shares to about 1.47M shares.
  • ECDA -30.95% after hours to $0.0946.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Telesat announces equity distribution of Telesat Lightspeed business
data.description:
• Telesat (NASDAQ:TSAT) said on Friday that it has completed the distribution of 62% of the equity of its Telesat Lightspeed business to an indirect subsidiary of Telesat Corporation. 
  • The indirect subsidiary is wholly-owned by Telesat Canada’s parent entities and is a non-guarantor under Telesat Canada’s debt documents. 
  • There are no changes to the company’s operations as a result of this transaction.

data.title: Arista Networks tumbles despite revealing higher-than-expected guidance at Analyst Day
data.description:
Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) dropped 9% by the close of market action on Friday, despite revealing higher-than-expected guidance during its Analyst Day event on Thursday.

Analysts and investors were mostly impressed with Arista's business update.

Goldman Sachs reiterated its Buy rating and $175 price target as it finds Arista to be a key beneficiary of the artificial intelligence infrastructure spending boom. 

"We are encouraged by ANET's above-consensus guidance for 20% revenue growth in 2026 and expectations to grow at a mid-teens% 2026-29 CAGR, particularly given both ANET's demonstrated history of raising its guidance over time, and its strengthened market position as a best-of-breed networking vendor, underpinned by its proprietary EOS which can offer customers greater network performance through simpler management, improved efficiency, and improved reliability," said Goldman Sachs analysts led by Michael Ng in a note.

They pointed out Arista's EBIT margin outlook for 2026 was below consensus but attributed this to the company's historical conservatism.

Similarly, Bank of America reiterated its Buy rating and increased its price objective to $175 from $155.

"Peaking growth trends in 2025 were a key concern following significant capex growth of Cloud Titans, but management discussed opportunities with new applications leading to large buildouts," said BofA analysts led by Tal Liani in a note. "AI networking is expected to grow from $1.5bn in 2025 to $2.75bn in 2026, representing 83% YoY growth, while campus is expected to grow 67% to $1.25bn in 2026."

Wells Fargo also reiterated its Overweight rating and increased its price target to $175 from $150.

"The company detailed how increasing difficulty in the diagnostic layer creates opportunity for its solutions," said Wells Fargo analysts led by Aaron Rakers in a note. "Arista reiterated that it has competed with whiteboxes for a long time and noted customers have a build-and-buy strategy."

data.title: Amazon Web Services head of startups, venture capital relationships resigns
data.description:
• The head of Amazon Web Services’ (AWS) venture capital and global startups business, Jon Jones, has resigned, the company confirmed to Bloomberg.
  • Jones, who succeeded Howard Wright a year ago, has led Amazon’s efforts to expand AWS adoption among new businesses and deepen the company’s relationships with venture capital firms. He previously led the global AWS Go-to-Market and Specialist business.
  • Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) did not state whether a replacement for Jones has been selected.

data.title: Faraday Future to spin-off its Crypto Flywheel assets into an existing listed company
data.description:
• Faraday Future Intelligent Electric (NASDAQ:FFAI) said on Friday that it is  actively preparing to spin off its crypto flywheel assets into a separate existing listed company. 
  • The spin-off plan aims to establish two independent listed systems—FFAI and a new company focusing on the Crypto Flywheel—that will operate independently while forming strategic synergies.
  • C10 & Crypto will be driven by its three engines of core businesses, including C10 Treasury, with the goal of accelerating the realization of its Web3 strategic vision. 
  • The move is expected to further advance the construction of an “independently operated, mutually empowered” Web2+Web3 dual-engine growth system. 
  • Faraday Future Intelligent Electric (NASDAQ:FFAI) shares were up more than 6% in extended trading.

data.title: Ten-League International receives Nasdaq deficiency letter
data.description:
• Ten-League International (NASDAQ:TLIH) announced on Friday that it received a deficiency letter from Nasdaq, stating that the company is not in compliance with the requirement to maintain a minimum bid price of $1.00 per share of its ordinary shares for continued listing.
  • The Notice has no immediate effect on the continued listing status of the ordinary shares on Nasdaq.
  • The company has been provided a compliance period of 180 calendar days from the date of the Notice, or until March 9, 2026, to regain compliance.
  • The company’s business operations are not affected by the receipt of the notification letter.
  • TLIH +4.36% after hours to $0.6053.
  • Source: Press Release
